privileged_info_summary: Verified that real-world log data is downloaded from SecRepo and Loghub. Confirmed the target alert name 'Brute_Force_Webhook_Alert', webhook URL 'http://10.0.0.50:8080/soar_webhook', and dashboard name 'SOAR_Integration_Health' explicitly match the task description and verifier scripts. Also verified the pre-seeded Splunk credentials are admin / SplunkAdmin1!.
